meta_description: Latest news, events and campaigns from Sleaford and North Hykeham Conservative Association, the Conservative Party in Sleaford and North Hykeham.

text_excerpt: Contact | Sleaford & North Hykeham Skip to main content Sleaford & North Hykeham Conservatives Main navigation About Us Get involved News People Events Contact Sleaford & North Hykeham Conservatives Contact Leave this field blank PO Box 11284, Sleaford NG34 4FW 07943 636 936 Please leave a message [email protected] Find us on Facebook First Name Last Name Postcode Address id Address 1 Email Mobile number Message I would like to be kept up-to-date by Sleaford & North Hykeham Conservative Association on future issues that matter to me: Yes There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy . Volunteer for us In which of these ways can you help us? Delivering a few leaflets locally now and again Helping with office and admin tasks Making calls to voters and volunteers Joining our canvassing team to knock on doors Potentially standing to be a local Conservative Councillor Becoming a Digital Ambassador By agreeing to volunteer for us, you also agree to us contacting you about volunteering. For more information, please see our Data Protection and Privacy Policy The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy . By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.
